headline: Baker Hughes Partners With ONGC To Deploy Advanced Wireline Solutions Across Onshore And Offshore Fields
summary: Integrated offering drives improved reservoir understanding, optimizing production across the asset lifecycleSolutions will support more efficient exploration and help maximize recovery from new and mature fields
